assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen defaults to SGW when no campus param is provided
assertionResults.title: defaults to SGW when no campus param is provided

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen uses Loyola when campus param is loyola
assertionResults.title: uses Loyola when campus param is loyola

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen switches campus to Loyola when the Loyola toggle is pressed
assertionResults.title: switches campus to Loyola when the Loyola toggle is pressed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen handles initial destination lifecycle
assertionResults.title: handles initial destination lifecycle

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen handles route steps panel interactions
assertionResults.title: handles route steps panel interactions

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen centers on user location without changing campus coordinates
assertionResults.title: centers on user location without changing campus coordinates

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Navigation Bar opens navigation bar when directions button is pressed
assertionResults.title: opens navigation bar when directions button is pressed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Navigation Bar closes navigation bar when close button is pressed
assertionResults.title: closes navigation bar when close button is pressed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Navigation Bar updates start and destination points when route is confirmed
assertionResults.title: updates start and destination points when route is confirmed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Navigation Bar closes navigation bar after route is confirmed
assertionResults.title: closes navigation bar after route is confirmed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Navigation Bar preserves route points when navigation bar is reopened
assertionResults.title: preserves route points when navigation bar is reopened

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Navigation Bar does nothing when location permission is denied
assertionResults.title: does nothing when location permission is denied

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Navigation Bar requests location and computes nearest building on mount
assertionResults.title: requests location and computes nearest building on mount

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen User Focus Counter increments userFocusCounter when my-location button is pressed
assertionResults.title: increments userFocusCounter when my-location button is pressed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Route Focus Trigger increments routeFocusTrigger when route is confirmed with a start point
assertionResults.title: increments routeFocusTrigger when route is confirmed with a start point

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Set As Start opens nav bar when a building is set as start via the map
assertionResults.title: opens nav bar when a building is set as start via the map

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Set As My Location sets demoCurrentBuilding when onSetAsMyLocation is called
assertionResults.title: sets demoCurrentBuilding when onSetAsMyLocation is called

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Steps Panel Focus User renders focus user button in steps panel and increments counter when pressed
assertionResults.title: renders focus user button in steps panel and increments counter when pressed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Dismiss Route clears route and steps when dismiss is pressed on steps panel
assertionResults.title: clears route and steps when dismiss is pressed on steps panel

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen keeps focusTarget as user when campus param changes (prev === 'user' branch)
assertionResults.title: keeps focusTarget as user when campus param changes (prev === 'user' branch)

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen computes nearest building on mount (skips invalid bbox and chooses nearest)
assertionResults.title: computes nearest building on mount (skips invalid bbox and chooses nearest)

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen opens and closes the ShuttleSchedulePanel
assertionResults.title: opens and closes the ShuttleSchedulePanel

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen does not toggle shuttle when shuttle is not available (and label shows not available)
assertionResults.title: does not toggle shuttle when shuttle is not available (and label shows not available)

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen toggles shuttle when available and auto-hides if availability becomes false while showing
assertionResults.title: toggles shuttle when available and auto-hides if availability becomes false while showing

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen clears initialStart and initialDestination when nav is closed
assertionResults.title: clears initialStart and initialDestination when nav is closed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen covers onInitialStartApplied and does not increment routeFocusTrigger when start is null
assertionResults.title: covers onInitialStartApplied and does not increment routeFocusTrigger when start is null

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel keeps next class panel hidden when no next class is available
assertionResults.title: keeps next class panel hidden when no next class is available

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel opens next class panel when next-class button is pressed
assertionResults.title: opens next class panel when next-class button is pressed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel closes next class panel when close button is pressed
assertionResults.title: closes next class panel when close button is pressed

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel loads schedule from cache on mount
assertionResults.title: loads schedule from cache on mount

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel confirms route from next class panel
assertionResults.title: confirms route from next class panel

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel recomputes next class when panel is opened
assertionResults.title: recomputes next class when panel is opened

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel displays next class info when schedule is loaded
assertionResults.title: displays next class info when schedule is loaded

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel shows Indoor button when selected building has a map and pushes indoor screen with floors
assertionResults.title: shows Indoor button when selected building has a map and pushes indoor screen with floors

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel hides Indoor button when selected building does not have a map
assertionResults.title: hides Indoor button when selected building does not have a map

assertionResults.fullName: CampusMapScreen Next Class Directions Panel falls back to empty schedule when cached schedule loading fails
assertionResults.title: falls back to empty schedule when cached schedule loading fails
